mapper.select: SELECT A.BRD_CD , A.BRD_NM , A.BRD_TYPE , A.BRD_PROP_BINARY , A.BRD_LIST_URL , A.BRD_DSCR , A.USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_BBS_BRD A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC
SELECT A.BRD_CD , A.BRD_NM , A.BRD_TYPE , A.BRD_PROP_BINARY , A.BRD_LIST_URL , A.BRD_DSCR , A.USE_YN FROM TB_BBS_BRD A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd}
